data.title: Comprehensive eval infrastructure deletion and reference cleanup
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Requirement
GREEN mode — no RED test task required. Exemption criterion 1: no conditional logic; all operations are file deletions and text reference removals. The comprehensive grep verification in acceptance criteria serves as the behavioral assertion.

## Scope

### DELETE these files entirely:
- plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/oscillation-check/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/resolve-conflicts/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/tickets-health/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/agents/approach-decision-maker/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- evals/red-test-evaluator/promptfooconfig.yaml
- evals/red-test-writer/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/generate-skill-eval.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/eval-daily-runner.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/sync-eval-model-ids.sh
- .github/workflows/eval-daily.yml
- plugins/dso/docs/SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md
- tests/evals/ (entire directory: evals.json, run-evals.sh, test_evals_runner_processes_single_entry.sh)
- tests/scripts/test-eval-daily-runner.sh
- tests/scripts/test-generate-skill-eval.sh
- tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh
- tests/scripts/test-sync-eval-model-ids.sh
- tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_skill_eval_tasks.py

### MODIFY (remove eval references):
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md: Remove the "Eval RED Task (Skill and Prompt Files)" section (approximately lines 663-676 and its surrounding context)
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md: Remove line 1094 eval REVIEW-DEFENSE comment that references eval suite
- plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md: Remove sync-eval-model-ids.sh references (lines ~139-142)
- CLAUDE.md: Remove "Skill evals" bullet from Architecture section and "run-skill-evals.sh"/"generate-skill-eval.sh"/"check-skill-refs.sh" from Quick Reference and never-do rule 25
- plugins/dso/scripts/check-model-id-lint.sh: Remove exclusions for SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md (line 111), promptfooconfig.yaml (line 112), and sync-eval-model-ids.sh (line 114)
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/TESTING_SESSION.md: Remove promptfoo references
- plugins/dso/docs/designs/TESTING_RESEARCH.md: Remove promptfoo reference
- package.json: Remove "promptfoo": "0.121.3" from dependencies
- package-lock.json: Regenerate by running npm install after removing from package.json
- .test-index: Remove ALL entries referencing deleted scripts/configs (run-skill-evals.sh, generate-skill-eval.sh, eval-daily-runner.sh, sync-eval-model-ids.sh, promptfooconfig.yaml, test-eval-todo-guard.sh, test-generate-skill-eval.sh, test-run-skill-evals.sh, test-sync-eval-model-ids.sh, test-eval-daily-runner.sh)

### PRUNE eval test cases from:
- tests/scripts/test-prior-art-search-eval.sh: Remove promptfoo references (keep any non-promptfoo test logic)
- tests/scripts/test-check-shim-refs.sh: Remove run-skill-evals.sh fixture reference
- tests/agents/test-red-test-writer.sh: Remove promptfoo references
- tests/skills/test-design-context-structure.sh: Remove promptfoo reference
- tests/scripts/test-model-config-integration.sh: Remove promptfoo reference

### FINAL VERIFICATION:
Run comprehensive grep to confirm zero residual references:
grep -r "promptfoo\|run-skill-evals\|generate-skill-eval\|eval-daily\|sync-eval-model-ids\|SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE" \
  plugins/dso/ CLAUDE.md evals/ tests/ package.json 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".git/" | wc -l
Expected: 0

## File Impact
| Source file | Action | Test classification |
|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| 15x promptfooconfig.yaml | remove | needs-removal (tests deleted) |
| 4x eval scripts | remove | needs-removal (tests deleted) |
| eval-daily.yml, SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md | remove | still-valid |
| implementation-plan/SKILL.md, sprint/SKILL.md | modify (remove text) | still-valid |
| CLAUDE.md, INSTALL.md, check-model-id-lint.sh, design docs | modify (remove refs) | still-valid |
| package.json | modify (remove dep) | still-valid |
| .test-index | modify (remove entries) | still-valid |
| 13x test files | remove/prune | needs-removal |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Zero promptfoo/eval references in plugins/dso/, CLAUDE.md, tests/, package.json
  Verify: [ "$(grep -r "promptfoo\|run-skill-evals\|generate-skill-eval\|eval-daily\|sync-eval-model-ids\|SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE" plugins/dso/ CLAUDE.md tests/ package.json 2>/dev/null | grep -v ".git/" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = "0" ]
- [ ] All 15 promptfooconfig.yaml files are deleted
  Verify: [ "$(find . -name "promptfooconfig.yaml" -not -path "./.git/*" | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = "0" ]
- [ ] All 4 eval scripts are deleted
  Verify: ! test -f plugins/dso/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh && ! test -f plugins/dso/scripts/generate-skill-eval.sh && ! test -f plugins/dso/scripts/eval-daily-runner.sh && ! test -f plugins/dso/scripts/sync-eval-model-ids.sh
- [ ] promptfoo not in package.json
  Verify: ! grep -q "promptfoo" package.json
- [ ] .test-index has no entries for deleted eval artifacts
  Verify: ! grep -q "run-skill-evals\|generate-skill-eval\|eval-daily-runner\|sync-eval-model-ids\|promptfooconfig\|test-generate-skill-eval\|test-run-skill-evals\|test-sync-eval-model-ids\|test-eval-daily-runner" .test-index
